subject: Biology
title: Endangered Species
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Endangered Species.

hook.text: Over 40,000 species are currently threatened with extinction according to the IUCN Red List.

buildup.text: Habitat destruction is the leading cause, followed by overexploitation and climate change.

discovery.text: The giant panda was once critically endangered. Decades of conservation pulled it back.

twist.text: For every famous animal saved, thousands of unknown insects and plants quietly vanish.

climax.text: Protecting one species often means protecting the entire ecosystem it depends on.

punchline.text: Save the habitat, save the species.

quiz.question: What is the leading cause of species endangerment?
